## Problem

What are you trying to do?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like PlainLink to add or change?

## Why It Fits PlainLink

Explain how this keeps PlainLink local-first, transparent, conservative, or easier to contribute to.

## Alternatives

Describe any workaround you use today.
